title: How to Automate Content Creation With AI in 2026 (AI Content Repurposing)
summary: Trupeer AI automates the video editing and content repurposing workflow by converting screen recordings into multiple polished outputs including tutorial videos, SOP documents, and multi-language translations in minutes rather than hours. The platform offers custom AI avatar creation, voice cloning, and one-click translation features to streamline content production.
writeup: This video demonstrates Trupeer AI, a platform that turns screen recordings into multiple polished outputs: tutorial videos, SOP documents, and multi-language translations, compressing a process that takes hours into minutes. It matters because the tool automates the video editing and content repurposing workflow rather than producing a single fixed format. Key features covered include custom AI avatar creation, voice cloning, and one-click translation.
